news.headline: Genomics company healthŌme® Inc. rebrands to Kadance Inc. in Huntsville, Alabama. Transition signifies commitment to DNA-powered health management.
news.summary: In Huntsville, Alabama on January 9, 2025, the genomics-based precision health management company known as healthŌme®, Inc. revealed its new identity as Kadance, Inc. This change reflects the firm's commitment to utilizing DNA technology for seamless health solutions.

news.headline: New CEO Séamus Lafferty appointed by Conductive Containers Inc., replacing Brad Ahlm after 1993. Private equity firm Great River Capital Partners involved.
news.summary: In Maple Grove, Minnesota, Conductive Containers, Inc. (CCI), a prominent supplier of static control packaging for electronics, high-value components, and optics, has appointed Séamus Lafferty as its new CEO and Board member. Lafferty takes over from Brad Ahlm, who held the position for nearly three decades. Back in late 2021, CCI collaborated with private equity firm Great River Capital Partners (GRCP) to undertake strategic initiatives. The transition marks a significant change for the company after Ahlm’s long tenure as CEO.

news.headline: EDF Renewables' Huck Finn Solar project, a 200 MWac/270 MWdc facility, begins operations in Dec 2024, creating 500+ jobs and aiming to generate over $14M for local communities.
news.summary: In December 2024, EDF Renewables North America revealed the Huck Finn Solar project had reached commercial operations. Constructed by EDF Renewables for Ameren Missouri, a subsidiary of Ameren Corporation, the project consists of a 200 MWac / 270 MWdc Huck Finn Renewable Energy Center now supplying electricity. The project, creating over 500 jobs during peak construction, is forecasted to bring in over $14 million in revenue for local communities.

news.headline: Analysts warn of 3 bearish factors for Bitcoin: gov't sell-offs, low liquidity, altcoin uncertainty. Risk of drop below $90K.
news.summary: Analysts are urging caution regarding Bitcoin's short-term price outlook, attributing it to various factors. Altcoin Sherpa noted a lack of buying pressure and warned about potential government sell-offs impacting Bitcoin's value. He cautioned overleveraged traders about significant losses if Bitcoin dips below $90,000, with possible drops to the mid-low $80,000s in certain scenarios. The absorption of the sell-off is uncertain, creating a precarious situation for Bitcoin. Analyst Kevin echoed Sherpa's concerns.

news.headline: ISS National Lab achieves record-breaking year with over 50 peer-reviewed articles in FY24, raising total to nearly 450.
news.summary: In the fiscal year 2024, over 50 peer-reviewed articles were published, contributing to a total of nearly 450 articles. The Kennedy Space Center in Florida reported this achievement on Jan. 9, 2025. The International Space Station (ISS) National Laboratory excelled in expanding scientific research frontiers and established a new milestone in scholarly contributions.

news.headline: $30M raised by 0G Foundation through AI node sales.
news.summary: In recent statistics, the number of coronavirus cases has reached over 5 million worldwide, with the death toll surpassing 300,000. The United States has the highest number of cases, with over 1.5 million people infected and 90,000 reported deaths. In Spain, there are over 230,000 confirmed cases, while Italy has reported over 220,000 cases. The global economy is also facing challenges, with the International Monetary Fund predicting a contraction of 3% in 2020. The pandemic has disrupted daily life and forced many countries to implement strict lockdown measures to curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: New brand Maven launches in Denver for sign design, rooted in legacy and vision. Focus on excellence. #signage
news.summary: In Denver, a new brand called Maven has been launched, focusing on sign design and implementation. The company aims to excel in this field, combining a rich legacy with innovative vision. The brand is set to make a mark in the signage industry, hoping to attract attention for its commitment to excellence.

news.headline: UnisLink appoints Julie Klapstein and Christine Schuster to board, enhancing expertise in healthcare services. PHOENIX, Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: UnisLink, a prominent company specializing in comprehensive revenue cycle management services, recently announced the addition of new board members on January 9, 2025. These new members bring expertise in technology-enabled healthcare services, revenue cycle management, and clinical practice. This strategic move aims to enhance the company's offerings, particularly in value-based care software and services. With these additions, UnisLink is positioned to strengthen its presence in the industry and drive further growth.

news.headline: Bet Caddy teams up with Profound Sports & Studio Init to offer personalized live sports experience. Chicaco, Jan 9, 2025.
news.summary: In Chicago on January 9th, 2025, Bet Caddy revealed exciting news about forming key partnerships. The next-gen sports entertainment platform shared collaborations with Profound Sports, an investment advisory firm and tech accelerator, as well as Studio Init, a comprehensive software development studio. This move signifies a significant step in Bet Caddy's growth strategy, linking up with reputable industry players to enhance its services.

news.headline: 30-year mortgage rate hits 6.93%, highest since July. Rising borrowing costs linked to government bond yields may deter buyers and sellers.
news.summary: Interest rates for borrowing have been increasing steadily over the past few months, aligning with the rise in yields on government bonds. This trend poses a risk of reducing the number of participants in the market, as both buyers and sellers may opt to stay out due to the heightened costs.

news.headline: Tropical Smoothie Cafe introduces Dragon Fruit & Nutella Tropic Bowls to menu, available from Jan 8.Summarized: New Tropic Bowls Dragon Fruit & Nutella added to menu at Tropical Smoothie Cafe starting Jan 8.
news.summary: On January 8, 2025, Tropical Smoothie Cafe based in Atlanta introduced two new items to its Tropic Bowl menu. The Dragon Fruit Bowl and Acai Bowl with NUTELLA® are now part of the core menu offerings of the cafe. These new additions bring a fresh and exciting twist to the menu, providing customers with unique and flavorful choices.

news.headline: LVVWD partners with American Water Resources to offer affordable water line protection to homeowners in Las Vegas Valley.
news.summary: The Las Vegas Valley Water District (LVVWD) based in Las Vegas has recently partnered with American Water Resources, a subsidiary of Oncourse Company, to provide optional water line protection services to homeowners in the area. This collaboration offers a cost-effective solution for residents looking to safeguard against unforeseen and expensive water line repairs. The protection plan is available for purchase by homeowners who receive services from LVVWD. This initiative aims to provide affordable support to local homeowners in protecting their water lines.

news.headline: Innovaccer raises $275M in Series F to boost healthcare cloud. Key investors include B Capital, Banner Health, Kaiser Permanente, and M12.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Innovaccer Inc., a prominent healthcare AI company, disclosed a $275 million Series F funding round. The round comprised both primary and secondary funding and saw involvement from notable entities such as B Capital Group, Banner Health, Danaher Ventures LLC, Generation Investment Management, Kaiser Permanente, and M12. This substantial investment is earmarked to support Innovaccer in broadening its partnerships with current clients, unveiling novel AI and cloud features, and augmenting a developer ecosystem.

news.headline: HealthEC and VirtualHealth merge to create Elligint Health, combining HELIOS® platform and population health analytics.
news.summary: Elligint Health is the new entity formed by the collaboration of HealthEC and VirtualHealth in Edison, N.J. This partnership combines VirtualHealth's HELIOS® medical management platform with HealthEC's population health analytics. The goal of Elligint Health is to revolutionize healthcare by providing data-driven solutions that streamline processes and facilitate targeted interventions. This merger aims to empower healthcare organizations to succeed in the value-based care model.

news.headline: Denise Davis appointed VP of Strategy & Communications at WSPA effective Jan 13, 2025. Leading petroleum innovation efforts.
news.summary: In Sacramento, California, the Western States Petroleum Association (WSPA) is excited to appoint Denise Davis as the Vice President of Strategy and Communications starting Monday, January 13, 2025. Davis will oversee WSPA’s strategic communications, supporting companies involved in petroleum exploration, production, refining, transportation, and marketing, as well as promoting progress in renewable fuels.

news.headline: Ellucian named to GSV 150 list for 5th year. Higher education AI leader. RESTON, Va., Jan. 9, 2025 - PRNewswire.
news.summary: Ellucian, a tech leader in higher education, is leveraging AI technology with a focus on student well-being. The company, headquartered in Reston, Virginia, made headlines on January 9, 2025, as it was recognized on the prestigious 2025 GSV 150 list. This list acknowledges the top players in the education sector, and Ellucian's inclusion signifies its position as a key player in the market. By prioritizing students and employing innovative artificial intelligence solutions, Ellucian is at the forefront of higher education technology.

news.headline: My Arcade® to relaunch Super RetroChamp™ at CES 2025, ultimate portable console for retro gamers. Originally revealed at CES 2020.
news.summary: My Arcade®, a top player in retro video gaming, has unveiled the Super RetroChamp™ at CES 2025 in Las Vegas. This portable console caters to retro gaming fans and was first showcased at CES 2020, where it garnered significant attention.

news.headline: General Dynamics to webcast Q4 & full-year 2024 financial results conference call on Jan 29. 9 a.m. EST. Visit www.gd.com for live webcast.
news.summary: A leading company headquartered in Reston, Virginia, General Dynamics (NYSE: GD) has announced the webcast of its conference call to discuss the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, January 29 at 9 a.m. EST. For those interested, the live webcast will be accessible on the official website www.gd.com. In case anyone misses the call, a replay will also be available for later viewing.

news.headline: Speyside Equity Advisers completes acquisition of GSC Technologies, Inc., enabling growth phase. (Characters: 93)
news.summary: Speyside Equity Advisers has successfully acquired GSC Technologies, Inc., bolstering the company's growth prospects. The transaction was finalized in Ann Arbor, Michigan on January 9, 2025. This strategic move positions Speyside to move ahead with its upcoming growth phase.

news.headline: Education Management Solutions introduces "Competency and Beyond" at IMSH 2025 in Orlando, emphasizing holistic solutions.
news.summary: Education Management Solutions (EMS), a prominent figure in healthcare simulation and competency management platforms, announced two remarkable advancements. Gearing towards a comprehensive strategy that goes beyond simple skills evaluation, EMS unveiled these significant developments in Orlando, Florida on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: Hyundai Motor Group and NVIDIA collaborate to utilize AI in mobility solutions, aiming for innovation and development.
news.summary: Hyundai Motor Group aims to integrate artificial intelligence (AI) into its primary mobility solutions to enhance innovation. The company will partner with various entities to implement advanced computing, generative AI, and industrial digitalization technologies. This collaboration will encompass a wide range of sectors, emphasizing the incorporation of cutting-edge AI capabilities into Hyundai's offerings.

news.headline: Sal Uslugil joins Ada to scale enterprise customer service, surpassing 5.5 billion interactions. Ada trusted by global enterprises.
news.summary: Ada has now exceeded 5.5 billion interactions and has appointed Sal Uslugil as Chief to expand revenue and operations globally. The announcement was made in Toronto on January 9, 2025. Ada is a leading platform utilized by international corporations to provide exceptional customer service.

news.headline: ISA announces 2025 Society leadership with Scott Reynolds as President. Key details released on Jan 9, 2025.
news.summary: In Durham, North Carolina, on January 9, 2025, the International Society of Automation (ISA) revealed the new leadership team for the term starting January 1, 2025. The Executive Board comprises President Scott Reynolds from Johns...

news.headline: Fortress Building Products introduces updated product and labor warranties for competitive advantage. Jan. 9, 2025, GARLAND, Texas.
news.summary: Fortress Building Products, a top supplier of wood-alternative outdoor building materials, has revealed updates to its warranty programs as of January 9, 2025 in Garland, Texas. This initiative provides competitive benefits for Fortress® Preferred Contractors. This move aims to offer enhanced services and support for contractors dealing with outdoor building projects. The company continues to prioritize customer satisfaction through these updates.

news.headline: MobileX and Ethika are merging to launch ethikaX at CES 2025, combining style and mobile connectivity.
news.summary: Today at the Consumer Electronics Show in Las Vegas on January 9, 2025, MobileX, a wireless service known for its high level of customization to help users save on costs, partnered with Ethika, a prominent lifestyle brand focused on personal identity. This collaboration will introduce a new venture where both companies will join forces to launch a...

news.headline: Hermès International reports share and voting rights as of 12/31/24.
Citadel EHS appoints Kier DeLeo as COO to boost operational excellence. Key info: Kier DeLeo, COO, effective January 1, 2025.
news.summary: In Pasadena, California on January 9, 2025, Citadel EHS has officially appointed Mr. Kier DeLeo as the Chief Operating Officer (COO) starting from January 1, 2025. This move highlights Citadel's dedication to improving operational efficiency and effectiveness.

news.headline: Dr. Christina Rodriguez is named Medical Director of Advanced Cardiac Imaging at MemorialCare Heart & Vascular Institute in Long Beach.
news.summary: In Long Beach, California, on January 9, 2025, Christina Rodriguez, M.D., has been appointed as the medical director of advanced cardiac imaging at MemorialCare Heart & Vascular Institute located at Long Beach Medical Center. Dr. Rodriguez, who is fellowship-trained and board-certified in non-invasive techniques, will take on this new role.

news.headline: United Imaging is expanding US manufacturing space in Houston, Texas; tripling the current facility's size.
news.summary: United Imaging, a major player in cutting-edge medical imaging and radiotherapy equipment globally, has recently announced its plans to expand its current production facility and headquarters in Houston, Texas. By securing additional space, the company will increase its square footage by over three times the current capacity. This significant development is expected to greatly enhance the company's operational capabilities and accommodate its growth. The expansion project in Houston reflects the company's commitment to its presence in the region and its dedication to advancing medical technology.

news.headline: Linux Foundation launches initiative to support Chromium browsers. Supports open development for projects in Chrome ecosystem. Jan 9, 2025.
news.summary: A recent announcement on Jan. 9, 2025, in San Francisco revealed a new initiative by The Linux Foundation aimed at bolstering open development and advancing projects in the Chromium ecosystem. The initiative, called Supporters of ..., is set to drive innovation by fostering collaboration within the open-source community. The Linux Foundation, a nonprofit organization dedicated to promoting mass innovation through open-source technologies, is spearheading this effort. This initiative is expected to significantly impact the Chromium ecosystem by enhancing project development and fostering a supportive environment for open collaboration.

news.headline: Mortgage rates rise as 30-year fixed-rate reaches 6.93%, according to Freddie Mac survey.
news.summary: Freddie Mac, headquartered in McLean, Virginia, recently announced the latest findings from its Primary Mortgage Market Survey® (PMMS®) on January 9, 2025. The survey revealed that the average rate for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) currently stands at 6.93 percent.

news.headline: Shares & voting rights on Dec 31, 2024: Total shares outstanding, along with voting rights, will be disclosed.
Rexel reported total shares and voting rights as required by French Commercial Code and Autorité des marchés financiers.
news.summary: Rexel has issued a statement regarding the total count of shares and voting rights in compliance with Article L.233-8 II of the French Commercial Code and Article 223-16 of the General Regulations of the French Autorité des marchés financiers. This disclosure is integral to ensuring transparency and regulatory adherence. The provided data outlines the complete number of shares and voting rights held by the company, exemplifying a commitment to regulatory compliance and accountability to stakeholders.

news.headline: LA Mayor lifts evacuation orders in Hollywood area. #Bloomberg #LA #evacuation
Ethereum price drops 5% in 7 days to $3,302.04 with a market cap of $397.8 billion. Analysts see a buy-the-dip opportunity.
news.summary: The declining price of Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) presents a potential opportunity for accumulation, although traders are anticipating further corrections before a potential rally. Currently, Ethereum is priced at $3,302.04 with a market cap of $397.8 billion. Over the last 24 hours, there has been a slight decrease of -0.1%, and over the past 7 days, it has decreased by -4.9%. Comparatively, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is priced at $94,246.74 with a market cap of $1.9 trillion. It saw a decrease of -0.3% in the last 24 hours and -2.9% over 7 days. XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) is priced at $2.32 with a market cap of $132.3 billion, showing a positive 24-hour trend of +1.6% but a decrease of -4.2% over 7 days.According to analysis from trader Ali Martinez, a potential drop in Ethereum to $2,900 could be highly bullish, marking an "excellent buy-the-dip opportunity" with a target of $7,000. Crypto Wolf predicts that Ethereum has minimal downside remaining, expecting a correction of only 4-7% before starting a run towards new all-time highs. The future outlook for Ethereum remains speculative, with diverse opinions among traders in the current market conditions.

news.headline: BoE Breeden: The bank rate will be coming down; the question is pace.
Verizon waives call/text/data fees for customers in SoCal due to wildfires and windstorm Jan 9-18.
news.summary: From January 9 to January 18, customers in the most severely affected counties of California will not be charged for any calls, texts, or data usage.

news.headline: BoE Breeden: What is key for the BoE is how the rest of the world reacts to Trump.
BoE Breeden: I don't have a particular path for the bank rate in my mind right now.
Freddie Mac: 30-year fixed-rate mortgage averaged 6.93% as of january 9th.
Bureau Veritas reports share count and voting rights as of December 31, 2024.
Insignia Capital Group in Walnut Creek, CA welcomes Tiffany Obenchain back as Partner after her tenure from 2014.
news.summary: Today, Insignia Capital Group, a private equity firm located in Walnut Creek, California, shared that Tiffany Obenchain has returned to the company as a Partner. Tiffany had previously worked with Insignia as an investment professional from 2014 to present.

news.headline: Dassault Aviation: Reports aircraft deliveries, orders, and backlog figures as of December 31, 2024.
Microsoft and Google contribute $1M to Trump's inauguration fund.
Park City Strike resolved after nearly two weeks, resulting in higher wages for ski patrollers. Holiday period affected, sparking online debate.
news.summary: The strike lasting almost two weeks severely impacted the biggest ski resort in the U.S. during a peak holiday season. It also led to widespread online criticism regarding the increasing economic disparity in rural mountain regions.

news.headline: OnPay secures $100M+ funding with $63M Series B led by Carrick Capital Partners, AB Private Credit Investors, and MC Credit Partners.
news.summary: OnPay, a top provider of payroll, HR, and benefits solutions, revealed that it has successfully acquired over $100 million in funding. The funding includes a $63 million Series B funding round spearheaded by Carrick Capital Partners, with contributions from AB Private Credit Investors and current investors, alongside a debt facility offered by MC Credit Partners. This significant funding marks a pivotal moment for the company.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer named Leader in EHS software by Verdantix Green Quadrant: EHS Software 2025 report.
news.summary: Wolters Kluwer, a renowned provider of professional information, software solutions, and services worldwide, has recently been recognized as a Leader in the Verdantix Green Quadrant: EHS Software 2025 analysis. This report offers an in-depth, data-driven evaluation of the top 21 environment, health, and safety (EHS) platform solutions available. Verdantix, a respected research and advisory firm known for driving innovative advancements globally, conducted the study. The acknowledgment underscores Wolters Kluwer's position as a prominent player in the industry, reflecting its commitment to excellence in the EHS sector.

news.headline: Lemonway launches Online Onboarding solution for marketplaces, streamlining merchant process. Helps marketplaces focus on growth.
news.summary: A European payment institution, Lemonway, has recently launched Online Onboarding, a new solution aimed at improving the merchant onboarding process for marketplaces. This innovation aims to simplify and enhance the onboarding process for marketplaces by eliminating the need for them to handle new customer onboarding internally. This allows marketplaces to prioritize strategic initiatives and business expansion while maintaining competitiveness with their partners. The turnkey solution is now available, offering a seamless and efficient onboarding experience for merchants.

news.headline: Palm Beach Capital invests in MBI Companies, a Knoxville architecture firm; launching national design services platform.
news.summary: A private equity fund based in West Palm Beach, Florida, Palm Beach Capital Fund VI, L.P. ("PBC"), has revealed the acquisition of a stake in MBI Companies, Inc. ("MBI Companies"), an established architecture and engineering design firm in Knoxville, Tennessee. This move is part of PBC's initiative to establish a national architecture and design services firm. The investment has been made through one of PBC's entities, signaling the launch of a new investment platform. This investment marks a strategic step towards the goal of building a prominent presence in the architecture and design sector.

news.headline: DXC teams up with Ferrari to enhance infotainment systems for upcoming vehicles, including F80 supercar.
news.summary: ASHBURN, Va. - On January 9, 2025, DXC (listed as NYSE: DXC) revealed a new deal with Ferrari to enhance their collaboration in crafting advanced in-vehicle infotainment systems for Ferrari's latest supercar, the F80. This agreement marks a significant development in their partnership and aims to pave the way for future innovations and upgrades in Ferrari's infotainment technology.
